versions.changelog: Robust VM creation: active lock polling instead of fixed delays, disk resize with 3 retries on slow storage, stale cloud-init drive deleted and recreated fresh, detailed step-by-step logging
Disk resize non-fatal: qemu-img timeout on slow storage (qcow2/RAID) no longer blocks VM creation; VM is created successfully, disk can be resized manually from Proxmox
Fix persistent lock timeout: add 3s pause after clone task before acquiring VM lock; await resize task completion before proceeding with config changes
Fix lock timeout on disk resize: move resize before cloud-init config changes to avoid Proxmox VM lock conflict

Fix hostname and IP not applied: delete cloned cloud-init drive and recreate it fresh in the same API call as ipconfig0/hostname, so Proxmox generates the image with correct settings instead of stale template data
Fix static IP assignment: force cloud-init drive regeneration after config to prevent VM from booting with stale IP from template; reset template selection when hypervisor changes

Fix template real specs: backend now reads VM config from Proxmox for accurate cores/RAM/disk (maxdisk is 0 for stopped template VMs in list endpoint); frontend prefers live values over stored defaults
Templates: read real CPU cores, RAM and disk specs from Proxmox; auto-fill form when discovering a template; show specs in template cards on Create VM page
Templates auto-refresh after adding new template; manual refresh button on Dashboard and VM List pages
Fix sequential updates: download all update zips before launching update script, fixes chain updates failing when multiple versions need to be applied
Create VM: templates are now filtered by the selected hypervisor, showing only relevant templates
Fixed sidebar: sidebar now stays fixed on the left side on desktop, only the content area scrolls
English Translation: all UI text and API messages translated from Italian to English across frontend (15 files) and backend (9 files)

Responsive Design: layout completamente responsive per mobile e tablet. Sidebar con hamburger menu su mobile, tabelle VM convertite in card list, modal bottom-sheet su mobile, griglie e padding adattivi su tutti i breakpoint
Fix SSH terminale: inizializzazione xterm.js tramite callback ref con buffer dati e delay per layout DOM
Auto-installazione qemu-guest-agent via cloud-init vendor-data su ogni nuova VM creata, rilevamento automatico storage snippets
Fix SSH: risolto terminale vuoto dopo connessione (race condition rendering xterm.js), rimosso campo Host manuale
Fix SSH: recupero IP con fallback multipli (guest agent, VM detail, cloud-init ipconfig0), messaggi di errore dettagliati
Fix: recupero IP della VM via QEMU Guest Agent per connessione SSH
Console SSH Web: terminale SSH integrato nella pagina VM con xterm.js, proxy WebSocket, recupero IP via QEMU Guest Agent
Hypervisor filter on Dashboard VM List and Templates, fix update extraction

Initial release: Dashboard VM, Hypervisor management, VM creation from templates, Cloud-init configuration, MAC address uniqueness, Machine-id regeneration, WebSocket real-time updates, Online update system
